name: GetCapture
description: Retrieve a specific capture by its ID and the associated payment ID. This endpoint returns detailed information about a single capture, including amount, settlement details, and timestamps.

payment_id.description: The ID of the payment associated with the capture (e.g., 'tr_WDqYK6vllg').

capture_id.description: The ID of the capture to retrieve (e.g., 'cpt_4qqhO89gsT').

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode capture information, or omit for live mode.
